title: Branding
description: Customize how your workspace looks across the apps.

name.title: Application name
name.description: Shown in the header, sign-in screens, and the browser tab.
name.label: Name

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: Displayed beside the app name. PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
logo.hint: Recommended: a square image, at least 64×64px, up to 2MB.

form.name-too-long: Name must be 60 characters or fewer.
form.logo-invalid-type: Logo must be a PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF image.
